name: A Holding Cell
description:
Much like your own, this cell offers no comfort whatsoever.  In fact, this
cell is MUCH more uncomfortable than yours was.  Sitting close enough for you
to reach through the bars and touch it is an outhouse.  Actually, all you know
for sure is that it is a small square building that smells like something out
of a cheap 'B' horror movie.  Just the same, you assume it's an outhouse.  
Another clue to the small building's capacity is the tepid trail, a mini
stream, of urine which runs downhill right through the middle of this cell -
EWWWWWW!
